  "reasoning": "ebal struggles beyond ~21 covariates. Best result so far was CBPS iteration 3 (ESS=25, balanced). Returning to CBPS with comprehensive covariate list including all previously imbalanced variables (Smoking, MV, DON_Diabetes, Tx_interal added). CBPS handles large covariate sets well."
}

이 설정을 PS_Explorer에 입력하거나 PS_AI/best_result.json을 참조하세요.
